sections.paragraph:
κατάκριτος, ον (s. three prec. entries; Diod S 33, 2; Plut., Mor. 188a; Ps.-Lucian, Am. 36; 52; SEG VIII, 13, 21 [=Boffo, Iscrizioni no. 39]; Philo, Virt. 139; Jos., Bell. 1, 639; 6, 108; AcJ 10 [Aa II/1, 157, 12]) pert. to being subject to the carrying out of a sentence, condemned abs. IEph 12:1; ITr 3:3; IRo 4:3.

prec. prec. = preceding

Diod S Diod S , I b.c.—List 5

Plut Plut , I–II a.d.—List 5

Ps.-Lucian Ps.-Lucian , after II a.d.—List 5

SEG SEG = Supplementum Epigraphicum Graecum—List 3

Boffo, Iscrizioni Boffo, Iscrizioni = LB., Iscrizioni greche e latine—List 3

Philo Philo = P. of Alexandria, I b.c.–I a.d.—List 5

Jos. Jos. = Josephus. This abbr. used when follow by title; I a.d.—Lists 5

AcJ AcJ = Acts of John—List 5

Aa Aa = Acta apostolorum apocrypha—List 5

pert. pert. = pertaining (to)

abs. abs. = absolute

IEph IEph = Ignatius to the Ephesians—List 1

ITr ITr = Ignatius to the Trallians—List 1

IRo IRo = Ignatius to the Romans—List 1

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 519
